CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-01-2018 Continued To Nov-20-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ARBITRATOR JURISDICTION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar Jul-27-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-16-18 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO ARBITRATION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar Mar-16-2018 Set To Order To Arbtitration Calendar

ASSIGN TO ARBITRATION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar Feb-27-2018 Select Panel Of Arbitrators

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff Responses To Written Discovery And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-14-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT MATTHEW LAYTON's Motion To Compel Plaintiff Responses To Written Discovery And Request For Sanctions - Defendant Matthew Layton's motion to compel plaintiff's responses to form interrogatories, special interrogatories, request for production of documents and statement of damages is granted. Since the filing of the motion plaintiff has served without objection his responses to the discovery requested which renders the motion moot except as to the statement of damages. Plaintiff is ordered to serve a statement of damages within thirty (30) days from the date of this order. Plaintiff has provided no explanation as to his failure to file timely responses; accordingly, the court will impose sanctions against plaintiff and plaintiff's counsel in the sum of $750.00, payment of which should be made within ten(10) days from the date of this order.

ORDER SIGNED. Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-01-2017 Assigned To Arbitration On Feb-26-18
